result.stdout:
Description:
  Main entry point

Usage:
  ProcessNSwagClient [<args>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <args>  Files to process

Options:
  --overrides <overrides>  Filename for overrides values
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
